college_info.college_name: NIILM University

highlights.summary:
PhD 2023 application was closed on Aug 26 and the entrance exam was held on Aug 27. Further, admissions 2023-24 are open to DPharma.

Established in 2011 by the Haryana State Legislature under Haryana Act No. 16, NIILM University is based in Kaithal, Haryana. It is a private university which has gained approval from the University Grants Commission (UGC) and has been accredited by National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). It offers multi-disciplinary courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma level in diverse streams like Engineering and Technology, Science, Commerce, Business Administration, Computer Application and Legal Studies.

The University comprises seven schools offering courses across specialisations like Agriculture and Forestry, Law, Hotel Management and Tourism, Applied Science, Mass Media and Communication, Management and Fashion Technology. Additionally, it consists of three faculty namely Faculty of Education, Faculty of Art & Languages and Faculty of Social Sciences.

The process of NIILM University admission 2020 is conducted in both online as well as offline modes.  Admission to courses are either done on the basis of merit, score in national-level or University-conducted entrance exams. Details regarding eligibility criteria for different courses are shared below:

Note: The University conducts its own entrance exam and details can be checked at the official website.

NIILM University offers undergraduate and postgraduate programmes with varied durations. It provides a four-year BTech programme along with three-year duration courses like BTech (Lateral Entry), LLB, BSc, BCom, BBA and MCA. Other PG courses like MSc, MCom and MBA are of two years whereas BALLB at the UG level is of five years. The doctoral level course i.e. PhD can be opted in full-time/ part-time/ off-campus modes as per students’ preference.

All these courses are covered across specialisations like Engineering, Management, Law, Commerce, Science, Humanities & Arts, Fashion, Hospitality, Mass Media & Communication, Computer Applications, Education, and Agriculture. The University also offers diploma courses of 18-month duration in Agriculture, Hotel Management, Food Production, Home Keeping, Front Office, Food & Beverage Service.

Below listed are some of the popular NIILM University courses along with their eligibility and fee structure:

NIILM University Placements

As per the information available on the official university website, topmost recruiters who participated in NIILM University placements 2019 and hired hotel management students include Crown Plaza, MSG Hotel, Radisson Ludhiana, Hotel Arista, Grace Hotel Kaithal, Omaxe, Aviva, Fortune, Amar Valley, Country Inn Suits, The Bristol Gurgaon, RJ Hotel & Resort, Ramada, to name a few.

Note: The official website of University college has no information regarding the placement success rate and salary packages offered to students in recent years.

Check out details on NIILM University Placements

NIILM University Scholarships are offered to both economically-weak and meritorious students. The University offers a Fee Waiver Scheme to aid students and also assist them in securing educational loans from nationalised banks at nominal interest rate.

review_content.Placements: Forget the word placements while taking admission in NIIM University, Kaithal because there is a special system for students taking admission here. The placements are at a good level only for hotel management, but not for B.Tech or MBA, in which they provide placement assistance to students. I think according to a general student, who passed out from there, he will suggest you, to take an admission there for MBA if you're capable of cracking the MBA entrance examination.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average because classrooms are not furnished, and when you look into the campus to see the infrastructure, you can judge how much standards are maintained and what they're developing in the university. Wi-Fi facility is not available to student's devices; it means no liberty on the internet uses for the students. About library, it is average, not more than this because when you need the particular book for your exam or reading purpose that wouldn't be there in enough quantity.

content.Placements: Forget the word placements while taking admission in NIIM University, Kaithal because there is a special system for students taking admission here. The placements are at a good level only for hotel management, but not for B.Tech or MBA, in which they provide placement assistance to students. I think according to a general student, who passed out from there, he will suggest you, to take an admission there for MBA if you're capable of cracking the MBA entrance examination.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average because classrooms are not furnished, and when you look into the campus to see the infrastructure, you can judge how much standards are maintained and what they're developing in the university. Wi-Fi facility is not available to student's devices; it means no liberty on the internet uses for the students. About library, it is average, not more than this because when you need the particular book for your exam or reading purpose that wouldn't be there in enough quantity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is so good and the campus is also very good.

content.Placements: I myself Prateek Srivastava completed my B.Tech degree from NIILM University Kaithal Haryana. The best college life I have enjoyed here. Suppose total of 25-27% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is around 49 LPA, and the lowest salary is 8 LPA. Top recruiter companies for my course are LNT and HCL. 100% of students got internships in all around recruiter companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is so good and the campus is also very good. The campus is full of air conditioning and Wi-Fi. There are several labs and libraries.

hostel.description: The Hostel accommodation is spacious, fully furnished and has temperature controlled rooms with plenty of storage space, round-the-clock janitorial services, power backup and 24- hour clean drinking water, Internet connectivity through Wi-Fi system, Facilities for indoor and outdoor games like Table tennis, Badminton, Football, Basket Ball, Volleyball, Lawn Tennis, Cricket, Hockey etc, L.C.D. TV in each hostel block, Campus clinic with ambulance to provide medical assistance to students, 24 x 7, Hygienic mess facility with vegetarian meals only, Two wheelers may be allowed for hostel residents after approval from authorities (Four wheelers are strictly prohibited), 24 hours security, Gymnasium facility, Laundry facility (optional on payment basis), Tuck shops to cater to all needs of the students at all hours and Availability of Newspapers and Magazines. There is a separate hostel facility for boys and girls within the campus. Hostel accommodation would be allotted strictly on ‘first come first served ‘ basis. Recreational rooms equipped with television, newspapers and comfortable seating are an instant hit with all residents.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It provides better campus interviews with practical classes, and skilled faculty members.

review_content.Placements: It provides better campus interviews, better practical classes, and skilled faculty members. The placements cell plays a crucial role in locating job opportunities for undergraduates and postgraduates passing out from the college by keeping in touch with reputed firms and industrial establishments. The placements cell operates round the year to facilitate contacts between companies and graduates. The number of students placed through the campus interviews is continuously rising. On invitation, many reputed industries visit the institute to conduct interviews.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Hotel Management and Catering Science - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: My college life was a mix of all phases. It gave me good exposure with amazing memories to cherish.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell at our college was pretty decent and maximum students got placements from college to the best reputed hotels like The Oberoi's New Delhi, The Leela palace Chennai, lemon tree hotels, Marriott and The Taj were the main hotels that visited our college. In the year 2013, 70% of the students got their placements with the in hand salary till 17k which was great as a fresher. We also had options to apply else where part from our the hotels that visited. In the 2nd year of our curriculum our year was divided into two halves, where the first 6 months we had classroom training and the remaining months it was a mandate to have an industrial training exposure. We all were given choices and preferences according to our hometowns to choose hotels so that we can stay at home and compete the internship. As I live in Noida I preferred to stay in Delhi and complete my training and hence I completed my industrial trading from The Shangrila Eros hotel at New Delhi in the year 2012. It helped me to choose my area of specialisation and gave the exposure of the actual hoteliers life. We were trainees who worked as normal employees and got stipend of 700rps a month which varied hotels to hotels. It was mandate to work in all the departments, so that we learn their role and to give makes us realise we're we can fit in and which is the best suited role.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend students to take admission in it.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs 20,000, and the lowest salary offered was Rs 12,000. The top recruiting companies were Taj and Shangri la. There were not many students who got placements or internships. The top role was associate level in every department.
content.Infrastructure: The outer infrastructure looks were excellent. But internally it was all messed up. All cheap quality doors were fitted, in classrooms, benches were like of old village government school's. There was no Wi-Fi facility, laboratories were outdated. The hostel was not good. There were no fans, bunker beds provided with low-quality matters and pillows, water supply, and for closet flush water connection was disabled. The food served was not good, if non-vegetarian or some good dish was there in the menu, and it was rationed that only one time it was being served to one student.

individual_reviews.title: My college life was a mix of all phases. It gave me good exposure with amazing memories to cherish.

content.Placements: The placement cell at our college was pretty decent and maximum students got placements from college to the best reputed hotels like The Oberoi's New Delhi, The Leela palace Chennai, lemon tree hotels, Marriott and The Taj were the main hotels that visited our college. In the year 2013, 70% of the students got their placements with the in hand salary till 17k which was great as a fresher. We also had options to apply else where part from our the hotels that visited. In the 2nd year of our curriculum our year was divided into two halves, where the first 6 months we had classroom training and the remaining months it was a mandate to have an industrial training exposure. We all were given choices and preferences according to our hometowns to choose hotels so that we can stay at home and compete the internship. As I live in Noida I preferred to stay in Delhi and complete my training and hence I completed my industrial trading from The Shangrila Eros hotel at New Delhi in the year 2012. It helped me to choose my area of specialisation and gave the exposure of the actual hoteliers life. We were trainees who worked as normal employees and got stipend of 700rps a month which varied hotels to hotels. It was mandate to work in all the departments, so that we learn their role and to give makes us realise we're we can fit in and which is the best suited role.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best college in Kerala. It owns best hotel management college in Kerala 8 times.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are not 100%, but 99%. Most of the students have got placements, while some of them got entry-level, and some of the students have got the higher positions in the hotel industry. The hotel chains in India like TAJ GROUP, OBERAI GROUP, and intercontinental hotels etc., have come for the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is spread across 28 acres of land. The classrooms are different, and we have one library. The college provides Wi-Fi facilities, and we have two computer labs. We have two different restaurants, and more than three kitchens are available for practicals. We have separate housekeeping department etc.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend students to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The outer infrastructure looks were excellent. But internally it was all messed up. All cheap quality doors were fitted, in classrooms, benches were like of old village government school's. There was no Wi-Fi facility, laboratories were outdated. The hostel was not good. There were no fans, bunker beds provided with low-quality matters and pillows, water supply, and for closet flush water connection was disabled. The food served was not good, if non-vegetarian or some good dish was there in the ...

reviews.review_heading: Oriental School of Hotel Management is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in Oriental School of Hotel management are very good. They provide well-maintained libraries, classrooms, etc. The hostel facilities are also very good, but hostel food is very poor. But the hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It provides better campus interviews with practical classes, and skilled faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this college, resorts, gym, Wi-Fi, advanced kitchens, and equipment are available. Library and computer laboratories are also available. The infrastructure of a college plays a vital role in the development of this college as the students are now focusing on the laboratory, classrooms, etc. while selecting a college. It is important that the colleges have very good infrastructure with advanced laboratories equipped with state-of-the-art equipment.

reviews.review_heading: My college life was a mix of all phases. It gave me good exposure with amazing memories to cherish.
reviews.review_text: My college was located in the foothills of ooty hills and it was beautiful location to be at. The climate was pleasant throughout with light winter feels in the evening. The hostel rooms were pretty much like independent cottages with balcony attached and room to accommodate three people. We had a dinnig hall which was common for everyone where three time meals were served with fixed menu. The food cooked was fresh and delicious to eat. Our classrooms were well lit and airy with space to accommo...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best college in Kerala. It owns best hotel management college in Kerala 8 times.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of our college is spread across 28 acres of land. 
The classrooms are different, and we have one library. The college provides Wi-Fi facilities, and we have two computer labs. We have two different restaurants, and more than three kitchens are available for practicals. We have separate housekeeping department etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college providing good materialistic education as well as good pavement to students.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a number of facilities to students including Wi-Fi access, training restaurants, library, training kitchen. The classrooms and the campus are well maintained. They provide a variety of food both in the college as well as in the hostels which are prepared by the students and chefs. They have almost 3-4 hostels across the whole Wayanad. All the hostels are not well versed with all the facilities but far better when compared to other college hostels. Bus facilities are provided...

reviews.review_heading: Highly qualified and experienced faculty gives the students good education.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good facility, and the deign of the building is of high range. The college is located in a very good climate, in hill station temperature is always cool, and it has a very good view, practical labs, huge library, annual sports function inter college for the students. The college has more than 3 labs for production, a different lab for bakery and confectionery with all the equipment required for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The review of the Oriental School of Hotel Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and adaptive to live, work, and study. The good building and a good campus are waiting for you. The students enjoy nature's best. Here, the students can live in a pleasant climate and wonderful scenic beauty. The bus facility is available of out premises hostels. The traditional Kerala food is given for all the meals along with tea/coffee.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2017. Highly satisfied regarding the teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good. The class rooms and labs are highly equipped. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high speed and there are various clubs for extracurricular activities. The managerial skills of the students can be developed by such activities.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with a need to develop on its management skills.
reviews.review_text: Nice, very good infrastructure. One of the best amongst the ihms but not so good in facilities. Library with various useful study material and various kitchens make it modern and efficient for hospitality. Wi-Fi is available in campus but can never be connected. Phones are not allowed and if you do use it and get caught you need to pay fine.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental School of Hotel Management is a very professional college and they give us their best.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were good, still old buildings and stuff. But it was covered with natural beauty. They had computer labs, studio for media students, and AV room for them also. There was no canteen. Medical facilities, sports, and games were available.
